raw_input:
[4.0/5] Works well on dirty paws...if it fits These types of paw washing cups are an excellent way to clean muddy paws. I’m so glad the days of lugging a bucket of water are behind me. I’ve tried a couple different versions and found this one to be good, if it fits your dog’s paws.
I have a golden retriever. The box I received said “medium” and it works for her, though it’s a little tight. There are a lot of silicone bristles inside and while that’s good for cleaning, if you’re on the borderline of it fitting your dog, too many bristles make it difficult to get your dog’s paws in and out and to agitate the cup enough to clean. I didn’t see a size noted when I ordered, so I’m not quite sure if it’s possible to order different sizes since I don’t see that info on the Amazon page, just on the box I received.
Cleaning the cup is easy - just rinse if the water isn’t too dirty or unscrew the top and remove the silicone bristle insert for a deeper clean.
The included towel is nice and fluffy, but only the size of a standard washcloth. My dogs feet come out pretty wet, so the cloth is soaked by the time I’m done wiping her feet. I use a towel instead. [5.0/5] Works good I tested this out on my pugs the day it arrived. I first tested to make sure they didn't fight me too much when I stuck their feet inside of the cup. They didn't. So, I filled with warm water, stuck their foot inside, turned the cup, then pulled their feet out to dry.
Seemed to work good. I just want to be able to rinse their feet of any dirt, sand, pebbles, or anything else that gets stuck in their pads.
I like that it has a small handle so I can hook it up near the back door. [4.0/5] Easy to use, gentle, and effective Beautiful bright color makes it easy to locate in the puppy’s storage bin. I also like that its simply designed, easy to use, works well, its gentle on their paws, and it comes with a super soft drying cloth.

The silicon bristles are removable and it can be disassembled and thoroughly cleaned in minutes. We get a lot of use out of it and at first, our puppies found it to be a nuisance to pop each paw in the cup, now our pups have come to expect it.

We have been able to keep our light tan carpet free of dirty paw prints and have peace of mind that there aren’t any harmful residual chemicals left on their paws from our walks. We are happy with this product and would recommend it to others. [4.0/5] Easy to use Works! Looks just like the picture. My dogs were not afraid of it at all! Would recommend. [4.0/5] Good for cleaning paws The product is very easy to use and easy to clean your dogs feet. However make sure it will fit your dog feet. Our 65lb pitbull it worked on however our 92 lbs Doberman feet were barely too big. However it kinda worked. Does come with a little towel so they can get clean feet during a bath or after a hike. Was very useful [4.0/5] Wish my dogs loved it as much as I do! The concept is great and the design is effective. None of my 3 dogs are as much of a fan of it as I am though. They are good about letting me trim their nails, but wanted no part of dunking their feet into the cleaner. They like to swim...but this is different! 😂 I'm hoping they tolerate it better with more frequent use. As a result, I'm finding it necessary to have an assistant in order to use it. With one person holding the dog and one operating the washer, the cleaning goes much smoother. I love being able to get the sand off of their feet so they don'tdrag it into the car. [4.0/5] Double check size you need in my picture/review I was under the impression that the medium size would work for my chihuahua mixed dog based on the chihuahua they have pictured in their product picture. Boy, was I wrong because this thing is huge!

The box has a clear list of breeds each size is for and it would've been so helpful if it was included in the description. I've included a picture of it and typed it out below:

-Large: bulldog, German shepherd, golden retriever, husky, Labrador

-Medium: Australian shepherd, beagle, border collie, corgi, English bulldog

-Petite: chihuahua, Maltese, pomeranian, shih tzu, yorkie

Although I can't test it out on my dog, I tried it with my fingers. The silicone is soft and feels comfortable and the entire thing is easy to take apart and clean. I took off one star as the silicone has a pretty strong chemical smell. I would wash and air it out before using on your dog, especially if they have sensitive skin. The microfiber cloth is seriously one of the softest things I own haha. [4.0/5] Great A little messy so so outside if you can. Washes great. A little hard for larger dogs but once you get it, it’s magical for muddy paws! [5.0/5] Convenient The package came a little busted but the product was intact! It looks durable and of high quality. It works as intended cleaning their muddy paws --or at least most of it. The rubber inside is soft but sturdy enough to remove the mud. The cloth that came with it is extremely soft and useful for making sure my dogs' paws are dry. I just leave this product in my car since my dogs love to get muddy paws in the dog park. I can quickly clean them before letting them in the car. Perfect for messy animals! I'd recommend it. [3.0/5] Nice idea... if it works for your dogs... I ordered this for my schnauzer who I consider a medium sized dog in height if not weight. While it seems suitable, her paws are so skinny that there is not much contact with the rubber bristles. Needless to say, it does not get her any cleaner than soaking her paws then wiping them... so the grass really does not come off and neither does all of the stuff in her paw pads. Ironically, it makes my small dog want to join it the paw cleaning... he gets jealous at anything he is not allowed to do as well. It then becomes a mess and he is much too small... and still I have to do it. Also, there is the problem of where to put the cup that everything is accessible when we first come in... it really needs a dedicated shelf and something to make sure that it does not tip over. It is easy to clean the device parts. I assume that it may work for some that do not have small or skinny legged dogs, but not for us. It is easy to hold and use, but it is just too much work to get there with my small dogs and lack of a place to hold it. I am rating it three stars. As always, your mileage and preferences may vary... [5.0/5] HANDy for Dirty Paws [[VIDEOID:a9d4366e9768dd47df33f15a9df4853d]] It has been a wet Spring in Iowa. And puppies love the to play in the mud. This paw cleaner worked pretty well to get the garden mud off a Phoebe's paws. She is only an 8 pound Scorky (Scotty - Yorky mix). The cleaner would probably work better on medium or larger dogs but it did the job pretty well for her too. And she did not fight it at all so it was certainly not a painful experience. The included towel also worked well for drying her paws after the scrub. It was easy to use over the sink. You probably would not want to use it over the white carpet in your den.

The ringed lid screws off and allows the silicone fingered pad to slide out for easy clean up. There's also a wrist strap to guard against accidental drops. All in all, a well made, good quality product. [4.0/5] Works Good. Not For Large Dogs. I ordered this for my two dogs and it worked good, but it's not for large dogs.

I have a flat coated retriever mix and a bloodhound/chocolate lab mix and both of them have big paws. This is a medium and their paws barely got halfway in. It did work, but I couldn't get their paws in very far.

This is built really well and comes apart easily for cleaning.

Overall, a pretty good cleaning tool for those muddy paws after a nice walk. Just make sure you have the right size. [4.0/5] Cleans paws well, difficult to use with older dog Dog Paw Cleaner Size Medium - First, let me start off by saying this paw cleaner is a great invention! It does clean the paws well and is fast and easy to use. I was excited to get this and try with my three little dogs because I'm constantly washing feet in a bowl of water. It worked well with [5.0/5] Great for my baby I love it to keep her yeast infections down. I also keep the allergens outside. I have COPD and she brings a lot of pollen, grass, bugs ect. Wonderful [5.0/5] easy to use i use it for all my dogs and they are perfectly calm with it and washes great and washes out easily

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, customers are happy with this paw washing cup, giving it mostly 4 out of 5 stars. The general consensus is that it works well for cleaning muddy or dirty dog paws and is a convenient alternative to using a bucket of water.

The most common praise includes how easy it is to use and clean, with the silicone bristle insert being removable for thorough washing. Customers also appreciate the included microfiber towel, though some note it is too small to fully dry larger dogs' paws. The bright color and hanging handle are also mentioned as useful features.

The biggest concern across multiple reviews is sizing. Several customers received a size that was too large or too small for their dog, and many noted that size guidance is not clearly listed on the product page, only on the box. One reviewer helpfully shared the size guide from the box, which lists specific breeds for large, medium, and petite sizes. Customers strongly recommend checking sizing carefully before ordering.

A few other minor issues were noted, including a chemical smell from the silicone that one reviewer suggested airing out before use, some dogs being resistant to having their paws inserted, and the cup being a bit messy to use. Some customers with very small or skinny-legged dogs found it less effective due to limited contact with the bristles.

Overall, most customers would recommend the product, especially for medium to large dogs used after walks or outdoor play.
